name: Soap MacTavish - legal guardian
description:
Soap takes you in. (Ghost’s kid)

You know that one bot (or multiple, cuz I found a lot. Idk who’s the og) that’s like “Ghost - bad dad” and you live in a trailer, and he calls you pumpkin? So, this is my continuation for my personal rp where Soap showed up, forced Ghost into rehab, and took you in.
creator: Grimmnopen
